policy_name: Honeycomb Bakery RVA Expense Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.requirement: Original receipt or digital copy for all expenses over $10

context: This policy covers employee expense reimbursement for Honeycomb Bakery RVA. Applies to Aiden James McCarthy (owner), Kenji Alford (part-time baker), and Mira Vasquez (counter staff).
